{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N/E:X/CR:X/IR:X/AR:X/MAV:X/MAC:X/MAT:X/MPR:X/MUI:X/MVC:X/MVI:X/MVA:X/MSC:X/MSI:X/MSA:X/S:X/AU:X/R:X/V:X/RE:X/U:X"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-f5p7-2c9q-8896. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
phpMyFAQ before 4.1.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in FAQ creation and update endpoints that bypass sanitization through encode-decode cycles. The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with FAQ_ADD permission to inject malicious script tags via question or answer parameters, which execute in every visitor's browser when FAQ content is rendered with the raw Twig filter.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h36g-93qx-rxgr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T21:16:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h36g-93qx-rxgr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h36g-93qx-rxgr"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T19:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T21:31:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/thorsten/phpMyFAQ/security/advisories/GHSA-f5p7-2c9q-8896", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46363", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/phpmyfaq-stored-xss-in-faq-question-answer-via-encode-decode-bypass", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h36g-93qx-rxgr"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/thorsten/phpMyFAQ", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ: Stored XSS in FAQ Question/Answer via Encode-Decode Bypass of removeAttributes() Sanitization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T00:00:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h36g-93qx-rxgr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "phpMyFAQ/phpMyFAQ"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "thorsten/phpMyFAQ"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-09T00:00:26Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ: Stored XSS in FAQ Question/Answer via Encode-Decode Bypass of removeAttributes() Sanitization
